resolution_summary: Rolled back payment-service release and increased timeout budget.
root_cause: A misconfigured HTTP client timeout in payment-service caused cascading retries.

resolution_summary: Reduced index refresh frequency and scaled search pods to stabilize latency.
root_cause: Aggressive index refresh with concurrent high write throughput saturated search nodes.

resolution_summary: Enabled queue backpressure and increased notification worker concurrency.
root_cause: Provider-side SMTP throughput cap combined with unbounded producer burst.

actions_taken_json.verification: queue depth normalized under 200 within 40 minutes
